'''âng-d-t''' ('''kangadat''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:hieroglyph|hieroglyph]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ng-d-t
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:hieroglyph|hieroglyph]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âng-d-t
|-
! Lemma
| kangadat
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thingadat|thingadat]] || [[word:jingadat|jingadat]] || [[word:shingadat|shingadat]] || [[word:kingadat|kingadat]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthungadat|thuthungadat]] || [[word:jujungadat|jujungadat]] || [[word:shushungadat|shushungadat]] || [[word:kukungadat|kukungadat]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thungadat|thungadat]] || [[word:jungadat|jungadat]] || [[word:shungadat|shungadat]] || [[word:kungadat|kungadat]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thungadat|thungadat]] || [[word:jungadat|jungadat]] || [[word:shungadat|shungadat]] || [[word:kungadat|kungadat]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thengadat|thengadat]] || [[word:jengadat|jengadat]] || [[word:shengadat|shengadat]] || [[word:kengadat|kengadat]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothongadat|thothongadat]] || [[word:jojongadat|jojongadat]] || [[word:shoshongadat|shoshongadat]] || [[word:kokongadat|kokongadat]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thongadat|thongadat]] || [[word:jongadat|jongadat]] || [[word:shongadat|shongadat]] || [[word:kongadat|kongadat]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thongadat|thongadat]] || [[word:jongadat|jongadat]] || [[word:shongadat|shongadat]] || [[word:kongadat|kongadat]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠngadat|thĂŠngadat]] || [[word:jĂŠngadat|jĂŠngadat]] || [[word:shĂŠngadat|shĂŠngadat]] || [[word:kĂŠngadat|kĂŠngadat]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathangadat|thathangadat]] || [[word:jajangadat|jajangadat]] || [[word:shashangadat|shashangadat]] || [[word:kakangadat|kakangadat]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thangadat|thangadat]] || [[word:jangadat|jangadat]] || [[word:shangadat|shangadat]] || [[word:kangadat|kangadat]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thangadat|thangadat]] || [[word:jangadat|jangadat]] || [[word:shangadat|shangadat]] || [[word:kangadat|kangadat]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shangadat|shangadat]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshangadat|goshangadat]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishangadat|gokishangadat]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shangadatnĂŒ|shangadatnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshangadatnknĂŒ|goshangadatnknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishangadatnĂŒ|gokishangadatnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shangadatshĂ«|shangadatshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshangadatnkshĂ«|goshangadatnkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishangadatshĂ«|gokishangadatshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shangadatro|shangadatro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshangadatnkro|goshangadatnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishangadatro|gokishangadatro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shangadatmu|shangadatmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshangadatnkmu|goshangadatnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishangadatmu|gokishangadatmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shangadatsher|shangadatsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshangadatnksher|goshangadatnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishangadatsher|gokishangadatsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shangadatng|shangadatng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshangadatnkng|goshangadatnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishangadatng|gokishangadatng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shangadatya|shangadatya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshangadatnkya|goshangadatnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishangadatya|gokishangadatya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shangadatyam|shangadatyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshangadatnkyam|goshangadatnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishangadatyam|gokishangadatyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shangadatnĂŒshĂ«|shangadatnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshangadatnknĂŒshĂ«|goshangadatnknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishangadatnĂŒshĂ«|gokishangadatnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shangadatnĂŒro|shangadatnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshangadatnknĂŒro|goshangadatnknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishangadatnĂŒro|gokishangadatnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shangadatnĂŒmu|shangadatnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshangadatnknĂŒmu|goshangadatnknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishangadatnĂŒmu|gokishangadatnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shangadatshĂ«nĂŒ|shangadatshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshangadatnkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshangadatnkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishangadatshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishangadatshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shangadatshĂ«ro|shangadatshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshangadatnkshĂ«ro|goshangadatnkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishangadatshĂ«ro|gokishangadatshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shangadatshĂ«mu|shangadatshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshangadatnkshĂ«mu|goshangadatnkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishangadatshĂ«mu|gokishangadatshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shangadatronĂŒ|shangadatronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshangadatnkronĂŒ|goshangadatnkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishangadatronĂŒ|gokishangadatronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shangadatroshĂ«|shangadatroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshangadatnkroshĂ«|goshangadatnkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishangadatroshĂ«|gokishangadatroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shangadatromu|shangadatromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshangadatnkromu|goshangadatnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishangadatromu|gokishangadatromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shangadatmunĂŒ|shangadatmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshangadatnkmunĂŒ|goshangadatnkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishangadatmunĂŒ|gokishangadatmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shangadatmushĂ«|shangadatmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshangadatnkmushĂ«|goshangadatnkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishangadatmushĂ«|gokishangadatmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shangadatmuro|shangadatmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshangadatnkmuro|goshangadatnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishangadatmuro|gokishangadatmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
